title: Doff Multipurpose Lawn Seed Plus Procoat - 500g Lawn Feed Treatment for Gardens – 100% Coated Seed for Bird-Resistant, Hard-Wearing Green Grass Year-Around Growth
features: SUPERIOR LAWN QUALITY – Achieve a lush, green lawn with Doff Multipurpose Lawn Seed, this premium seed mix revitalises patches or creates new lawns. The advanced procoat nutrient ensures optimal seed placement and robust growth, delivering a durable, vibrant lawn

FAST & RELIABLE GROWTH – Simplify lawn care with this direct-sow formula, designed for quick germination. Cultivate a healthy, uniform lawn with this easy-to-use mix by scattering seeds evenly in spring or autumn and watering. Perfect for effortless lawn maintenance

BIRD-RESISTANT FORMULA - Protect your grass seeds from hungry birds with Doff's procoat covering. This innovative coating deters birds while enhancing growth rates, ensuring an even, greener lawn. Enjoy hassle-free gardening with reliable results

DURABLE & HARDWEARING – Create a lawn built to last. This hardy grass seed mix produces a robust turf ideal for busy-activity areas. A 500g pack of multipurpose lawn seed covers up to 20m², offering value for renovating and building lawn areas. Available in 500g and 1kg packs

GROWING GREENER – With decades of expert experience, Doff lawn care products deliver lush and healthy grass. Our quality-crafted solutions are packed in the UK, ensuring reliable results and rapid year-round growth and greener lawns
description: Doff Multipurpose Lawn Seed with PROCOAT 500g - LD500
